{{Infobox character
| name = Uncle Fury
| appears_in = Cradle
| affiliations = Akura clan
| introduced = Uncrowned
}}

''See also: [[Uncle Fury Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Uncle [[Fury]] is a powerful [[Herald]] and a prominent member of the [[Akura]] family. As the child of [[Malice]], born before her ascension to [[Monarch]], he is the father of the [[Sage]] [[Charity]] and holds the distinction of being [[Malice]]'s only direct descendant to reach the rank of [[Herald]]. Despite his massive frame, red eyes, and wild, shadowy hair—features that often strike enemies as terrifying—he is characterized by a bright, infectious personality and frequent, boisterous laughter. He shares a unique relationship with his half-sister [[Mercy]], as they are separated by centuries of age. [[Fury]] is a formidable combatant known for his intense love of battle and his tendency to seek out conflict, often shirking any duties he finds boring. He is a significant enemy of [[dragon]]-kind, ranked closely behind the [[Beast King]] and [[Northstrider]] in that regard. In combat, he utilizes [[Abidan]] armor, [[Wolf Division]] techniques, and shadow-based abilities to fight with extreme speed. While he is a pillar of the [[Akura]] family, his unpredictable and crazed nature can be a source of concern for his relatives. He is married to an [[Archlady]] named [[Naria]] and has many children, ranging from elderly descendants to young children.}}

== Uncrowned ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|[[Uncle Fury]] is making a selection in ten days.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c6">''Uncrowned'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Mercy]] mentions an [[Uncle Fury]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5">''Wintersteel'', chapter 5</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Uncle Fury]] began fighting during the conflict.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c19">''Wintersteel'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Bloodline ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Fury]] is [[Mercy]] and [[Pride]]'s uncle.<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c2">''Bloodline'', chapter 2</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|[[Uncle Fury]] is a member of the [[Akura clan]].<ref name="cradle-09-bloodline-c3">''Bloodline'', chapter 3</ref>}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Lindon]] reminds [[Mercy]] of her [[Uncle Fury]] due to his size and gestures.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c4">''Reaper'', chapter 4</ref>}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Uncle Fury]] is fundamentally incapable of listening to anything that sounds boring.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c8">''Dreadgod'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Waybound ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|[[Uncle Fury]] liked [[Mercy]]'s father.<ref name="cradle-12-waybound-c7">''Waybound'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Mercy]] refers to [[Akura Fury]] as [[Uncle Fury]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 6</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Uncle Fury]] wants [[Pride]] to pursue advancement at all costs.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Uncle Fury]] has blazing red eyes and waving hair.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c10" />}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|“Uncle Fury's selection is in ten days. I want you to be there.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c6" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|“Stay safe, tell Uncle Fury I’ll see him soon, and I’ll join you as soon as I can, okay?”<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c5" />}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|"You got me, Uncle Fury!" she called into the sky.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c6" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Bloodline]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Waybound]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
